/usr/bin/ar qc ../../../../lib/libnexus-tools.a "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/bootstrapping.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/gelu.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/layer_norm.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/ckks_evaluator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/softmax.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/matrix_mul.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/argmax.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/encryptionparams.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/evaluator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/bootstrapping/common/Choosemax.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/bootstrapping/common/MinicompFunc.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/bootstrapping/common/MinicompRemez.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/bootstrapping/common/Point.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/bootstrapping/common/PolyUpdate.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/bootstrapping/common/func.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/bootstrapping/common/Polynomial.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/bootstrapping/common/Remez.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/bootstrapping/common/RemezApp.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/bootstrapping/Bootstrapper.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nexus-tools.dir/bootstrapping/ModularReducer.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../../../lib/libnexus-tools.a
